motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def mergeAlternately(self, word1: str, word2: str) -> str:
    result = ""
    i, j = 0, 0
    while i < len(word1) and j < len(word2):
        if word1[i] < word2[j]:
            result += word1[i]
            i += 1
        else:
            result += word2[j]
            j += 1
    result += word1[i:] + word2[j:]
    return result

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(min(len(word1), len(word2))
space complexity: O(len(word1))
energy implications: LOW
